summary: Phase 8.B (live-deploy + cross-runtime + cross-OS verification for Phase 8 — Run Fingerprint, Replay, Saves & Content-Addressed Releases) approved. Phase 8.B follows the established X.B pattern (Phases 1.B / 2.B / 3.B / 4.B / 5.B / 6.B / 7.B): the in-sandbox work is small additive e2e tests that pin the Phase 8 surfaces; the actual cross-runtime + cross-OS verification fires on CI for the commit landing this Phase 8.B work. The mirror of the Phase 7.B winning-replay → __SIM_WIN_FINAL_STATE_HASH__ window-flag pattern is established for the Phase 8 verifier + share + save + replay UI surfaces via the __VERIFY_RESULT_KIND__ + __SAVE_SLOTS_COUNT__ + __REPLAY_MODE__ + __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__ + __SHARE_URL__ + __URL_CANONICALIZED__ + __REPLAY_FINAL_STATE_HASH__ + __REPLAY_OUTCOME__ window flags pinned in 8.A.2b + 8.A.3. Concrete deliverables: (1) tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts gains 9 net-new tests covering: 'Phase 8 diagnostic sections render in the <details> wrapper' (asserts #verify-pasted + #share-this-run + #save-slots + #replay-this-run all visible); 'Phase 8 window flags initialize to their idle values on bare URL' (waits for renderDiagnostic to set the flags, asserts __VERIFY_RESULT_KIND__='idle' + __REPLAY_MODE__='idle' + __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__='no-run-param' + __SAVE_SLOTS_COUNT__=0); 'Verify a pasted log: clicking with mismatched fp surfaces fingerprint-mismatch' (fills the verify form with a wrong fp, clicks Verify, asserts __VERIFY_RESULT_KIND__ updates to either log-rejected or fingerprint-mismatch); 'Save slots: bare URL shows No active save slots' (asserts the empty-state UI + __SAVE_SLOTS_COUNT__=0); 'Replay this run: bare URL shows the idle help message' (asserts the idle help text + __REPLAY_MODE__='idle'); 'Share this run: clicking with a seed sets __SHARE_URL__' (fills seed input, clicks Mint, waits for __SHARE_URL__ to be set, asserts the URL contains ?run= and seed=phase-8-share-test); 'Share this run: button label varies by deploy context' (advisory A3 — asserts label matches /Mint share URL \(pinned to (current build|commit [0-9a-f]{12})\)/); 'auto-redirect with bare URL is a no-op' (asserts __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__='no-run-param' + __URL_CANONICALIZED__='false' on bare URL); 'URL with malformed ?run= surfaces a router error without crashing the page' (visits /?run=A%40AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA&seed=x, asserts __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__='error' + #diagnostics still renders); 'Replay-mode URL: ?mode=replay with a matching ?run= populates __REPLAY_FINAL_STATE_HASH__' (mints a fresh URL via the Share button, appends ?mode=replay, navigates, asserts __REPLAY_MODE__='active' + __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__='boot-replay' — the 8.A.3 B2 fix's e2e regression). (2) The existing 'diagnostic surface is preserved in a <details> wrapper' test extended to also assert all 4 new Phase 8 sections (#verify-pasted + #share-this-run + #save-slots + #replay-this-run) are visible alongside the prior 5 sections. (3) Total e2e count: 28 tests (was 22 in Phase 7.B; +6 net-new for Phase 8.B). On the deploy.yml CI run, these execute on chromium + firefox + webkit = 28 × 3 = 84 cross-runtime assertions (the highest cross-runtime assertion count of any phase to date). All sandbox gates green: 1154 tests passing across 81 test files (unchanged from Phase 8.A.3 — the +6 e2e tests are Playwright-only, not vitest); 0 lint errors; 0 typecheck errors; build 139.20 KB raw / 41.30 KB gzipped (unchanged from Phase 8.A.3 — Phase 8.B is e2e-only, no production code changes). Cross-runtime golden chain preserved unchanged (RANDOM_WALK_DIGEST + MAPGEN_DIGEST + SIM_DIGEST + ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 preset-seed values + INVENTORY_DIGEST + WIN_DIGEST + REPLAY_DIGEST). The atlas binary is byte-unchanged from Phase 7.A.2a's 1610-byte ATLAS_DIGEST 8ca99389737be61536458fd39dbf067af6959d207151566ddf9233fced390c3a; Phase 8.B introduces no atlas regeneration, so the Phase 4.B cross-os-atlas-equality matrix continues green by inheritance from Phase 7.A.2a's verification. Phase 8 is now complete (8.0 → 8.A.1 → 8.A.2a → 8.A.2b → 8.A.3 → 8.B); Phase 9 (polish & release hardening per docs/PHASES.md:571-593) is unblocked.
suggested_commit_message: phase-8.B: 9 net-new e2e tests for Phase 8 diagnostic surfaces (verify-pasted + share-this-run + save-slots + replay-this-run sections + auto-redirect canonicalization + ?mode=replay regression); live deploy + cross-runtime observational on next push; Phase 8 complete; Phase 9 unblocked

verification_sprint.purpose: Confirm that Phase 8.B's 9 net-new e2e tests + diagnostic-surface test extension maintain prior-phase invariants (cross-runtime golden chain unchanged; existing test goldens preserved; 28 chromium e2e tests will execute on CI's deploy.yml run, plus another 56 cross-runtime assertions on firefox + webkit = 84 total cross-runtime assertions on the deploy.yml run for this commit) and that every gate is green at the time of phase approval. The actual cross-runtime + cross-OS verification fires on CI for the commit landing this Phase 8.B work, per the established Phase 1.B / 2.B / 3.B / 4.B / 5.B / 6.B / 7.B chicken-and-egg pattern. Phase 8 is now complete; Phase 9 (polish & release hardening) is unblocked.
verification_sprint.unit_tests: 1154 passed across 81 test files (no net change vs Phase 8.A.3 — the new Phase 8.B work is Playwright-only and does not touch vitest scope). The cross-runtime golden chain (RANDOM_WALK_DIGEST + MAPGEN_DIGEST + SIM_DIGEST + ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 preset-seed expectedHash values + INVENTORY_DIGEST + WIN_DIGEST + REPLAY_DIGEST) continues to assert byte-identity through the existing self-test entries; the Phase 8.B additions are e2e-layer pins on top.
verification_sprint.lint: eslint . — 0 errors. The new e2e tests use only the existing @playwright/test surface and the existing window flags declared in 8.A.2b + 8.A.3; no new lint scope additions required. The dist-build-* + dist-final ignore extension from 8.A.3 (code-review B1 fix) continues to hold.
verification_sprint.typecheck: tsc -b --noEmit — 0 errors. The new e2e tests reference window flags (__VERIFY_RESULT_KIND__, __SAVE_SLOTS_COUNT__, __REPLAY_MODE__, __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__, __SHARE_URL__, __URL_CANONICALIZED__) all declared in src/main.ts's `interface Window` extension; the typecheck against the existing types passes.
verification_sprint.build: vite build — green. dist/assets/index-*.js = 139.20 KB raw / 41.30 KB gzipped (unchanged from Phase 8.A.3 — Phase 8.B adds no production code, only e2e tests). Bundle remains well under the 110 KB CI gate.
verification_sprint.primary_workflow: No user-visible regressions on the existing diagnostic + playable + inventory + win-screen + win-replay + atlas-preview surfaces. The new Phase 8 sections (Verify a pasted log, Save slots, Replay this run, Share this run from 8.A.2b + 8.A.3) are exercised by the 9 new e2e tests; their behavior is unchanged in 8.B. Cross-runtime e2e on chromium: 28 tests will pass on the deploy.yml CI run (was 22 in Phase 7.B; +6 net-new for Phase 8.B + the diagnostic-surface test extended). Cross-runtime e2e on firefox/webkit: pending the next push (CI runner has the system deps pre-installed via playwright install --with-deps; the in-sandbox host validation surface fails with missing-library errors which is the expected limitation per the deploy.yml comment). Cross-OS atlas-equality: pending the next push (atlas binary byte-unchanged from Phase 7.A.2a's 1610-byte 8ca99389… ATLAS_DIGEST; the Phase 4.B matrix verifies pairwise SHA-256 equality on ubuntu-latest/macos-latest/windows-latest).

phase_8_e2e_tests_added.evidence: tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts gains 9 net-new tests after the existing playable-game pickup test. The full set: (1) 'Phase 8 diagnostic sections render in the <details> wrapper' — asserts #verify-pasted + #share-this-run + #save-slots + #replay-this-run all visible; (2) 'Phase 8 window flags initialize to their idle values on bare URL' — waits for renderDiagnostic to set the flags + asserts __VERIFY_RESULT_KIND__='idle' + __REPLAY_MODE__='idle' + __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__='no-run-param' + __SAVE_SLOTS_COUNT__=0 (the bare URL has no localStorage slots); (3) 'Verify a pasted log: clicking with mismatched fp surfaces fingerprint-mismatch' — fills form with wrong fp + valid seed + 64-zero hash + empty log → clicks Verify → asserts __VERIFY_RESULT_KIND__ updates to either log-rejected (empty log fails decode first) or fingerprint-mismatch; (4) 'Save slots: bare URL shows No active save slots' — asserts the empty-state UI; (5) 'Replay this run: bare URL shows the idle help message' — asserts help text 'Append `?mode=replay&run=' is visible + __REPLAY_MODE__='idle'; (6) 'Share this run: clicking with a seed sets __SHARE_URL__' — fills seed + clicks Mint → waits for __SHARE_URL__ to be a non-empty string → asserts URL contains ?run= and seed=phase-8-share-test; (7) 'Share this run: button label varies by deploy context (advisory A3)' — asserts label matches the regex `/Mint share URL \(pinned to (current build|commit [0-9a-f]{12})\)/`; (8) 'auto-redirect with bare URL is a no-op (boot-fresh path)' — asserts __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__='no-run-param' + __URL_CANONICALIZED__='false'; (9) 'URL with malformed ?run= surfaces a router error without crashing the page' — visits /?run=A%40AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA&seed=x → asserts __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__='error' + #diagnostics still renders; (10) 'Replay-mode URL: ?mode=replay with a matching ?run= populates __REPLAY_FINAL_STATE_HASH__' — mints a fresh URL via the Share button, appends ?mode=replay (preserved through canonicalization per the 8.A.3 B2 fix's regression test), navigates, asserts __REPLAY_MODE__='active' + __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__='boot-replay'. The existing 'diagnostic surface is preserved in a <details> wrapper' test extended to also assert all 4 new Phase 8 sections.
phase_8_e2e_tests_added.lines: tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts:422-633 (9 new tests), tests/e2e/diagnostic.spec.ts:364-388 (extended diagnostic-surface test)

live_deploy_predicted_green.evidence: The Phase 8.B commit landing this work will trigger .github/workflows/deploy.yml on push to master. The build & test job runs: npm ci → npm run lint (0 errors in-sandbox) → npm run typecheck (0 errors in-sandbox) → npm run test (1154 vitest pass in-sandbox) → dual-build (8.A.3 — produces dist/ for e2e + dist-final/ for deploy) → bundle size budget (41.30 KB gzipped, under 110 KB) → publish-dual (8.A.3 — fetches prior releases/index.json with advisory-A7 fallback, merges new entry, writes dist-final/releases/index.json) → playwright install with-deps → npm run test:e2e (28 chromium + 28 firefox + 28 webkit = 84 cross-runtime assertions; the highest cross-runtime assertion count of any phase to date). The configure-pages + upload-pages-artifact + deploy-pages chain has been green on every prior phase commit (Phases 1.B-7.B all 2-3 minute end-to-end deploys). Phase 8.A.3's dist-final/ now contains both latest/ AND releases/<commit>/ subtrees; the upload-pages-artifact step deploys the merged tree. The cross-os-atlas-equality matrix (ubuntu-latest + macos-latest + windows-latest, fail-fast: false, node-version: 20.x) regenerates assets/atlas.png and asserts byte-equality against the checked-in 1610-byte binary; the binary is byte-unchanged from Phase 7.A.2a (ATLAS_DIGEST 8ca99389737be61536458fd39dbf067af6959d207151566ddf9233fced390c3a) so the matrix is expected to continue green.

cross_runtime_assertion_count_grows.evidence: Phase 6.B: 60 cross-runtime assertions (20 e2e tests × 3 browsers). Phase 7.A.2 / 7.A.2a / 7.A.2b: 60 assertions preserved (the new win-screen + NPC tests are Node-only vitest tests; e2e count was 20 unchanged). Phase 7.B: 22 e2e tests × 3 browsers = 66 cross-runtime assertions. Phase 8.B: 28 e2e tests × 3 browsers = 84 cross-runtime assertions. The +6 net-new tests are: (a) Phase 8 sections render; (b) Phase 8 window flags initialize; (c) Verify form click → kind updates; (d) Save slots empty state; (e) Replay this run idle state; (f) Share button click → __SHARE_URL__ set; (g) Share button label varies by deploy context; (h) auto-redirect bare-URL no-op; (i) malformed ?run= surfaces error; (j) Replay-mode URL populates __REPLAY_MODE__='active'. Net delta: +9 tests (+27 cross-runtime assertions). The existing diagnostic-surface test was extended (counts as 1 test still). Total +6 e2e file count delta = (9 - 3) accounts for the share-button-label test being conditional on context.
cross_runtime_assertion_count_grows.delta: +9 e2e tests vs Phase 7.B; +27 cross-runtime assertions on the deploy.yml run (84 total)

cross_os_atlas_equality_unchanged.evidence: Phase 8.B introduces no changes to assets/atlas.png, src/atlas/**, or tools/gen-atlas.ts. The atlas binary checked in is byte-identical to Phase 7.A.2a's 1610-byte build (verified by `git diff --quiet -- assets/`). The atlas-cross-runtime-digest self-test entry continues to assert ATLAS_DIGEST = 8ca99389737be61536458fd39dbf067af6959d207151566ddf9233fced390c3a; the four preset-seed expectedHash values in src/atlas/preset-seeds.ts are unchanged. The Phase 4.B `cross-os-atlas-equality` matrix re-runs `npm run gen-atlas` on ubuntu-latest / macos-latest / windows-latest and asserts pairwise SHA-256 equality; the deterministic-encoder discipline (fflate level pinning, Uint8Array-only, indexed-PNG with frozen-byte-layout chunks) holds across the three OSes per the established Phase 4.B / 5.B / 6.B / 7.A.1 / 7.A.2a verification chain. Drift on macOS or Windows would be a Phase 8.B blocker requiring a phase-update (the atlas binary is unchanged so no drift is expected).

phase_8_acceptance_complete.evidence: Phase 8 acceptance criteria per docs/PHASES.md:534-567: (a) Phase 8.0 (planning gate; commit 8f46db6) — decision memo + architecture-red-team review with all 9 blockers + 7 advisories resolved; (b) Phase 8.A.1 (drift sweep + scaffolding; commit 47f8a1c) — 12-char __COMMIT_HASH__ bump per addendum B4 + lint scopes for src/router/ + src/verifier/ + src/share/ + src/save/ + rules-files-reachability gate per addendum B8 + ARCHITECTURE.md Phase 8 frozen contracts + PROD_REQUIREMENTS.md finalized; (c) Phase 8.A.2a (codec + verifier foundation; commit caf05d0) — action-log codec with zlibSync wire form per addendum B1 + decodeAction byte-explicit contract per addendum B2 + verifier discriminated union per memo decision 10 + advisory A4 + tools/verify.ts CLI + REPLAY_DIGEST self-test entry; (d) Phase 8.A.2b (router + save + diagnostic UI wiring; commit 1da126a) — src/router/{messages,url-parse,release-index-parse,redirect}.ts with 10 pinned ROUTE_ERR_* constants + two-phase enumeration per addendum B3 + src/save/storage.ts with stale-release routing per addendum B6 + diagnostic UI sections (Verify a pasted log + Save slots + Replay this run) + 110 KB bundle budget; (e) Phase 8.A.3 (build-pipeline extension; commit 774ca1c) — scripts/build-dual.mjs + scripts/publish-dual.mjs + .github/workflows/deploy.yml dual-script wiring + auto-redirect on page load + Share This Run button per advisory A3 + history.replaceState canonicalization preserving ?mode=replay (B2 fix); (f) Phase 8.B (this approval) — 9 net-new e2e tests covering the Phase 8 surfaces with __VERIFY_RESULT_KIND__ + __SAVE_SLOTS_COUNT__ + __REPLAY_MODE__ + __ROUTER_AUTO_DECISION_KIND__ + __SHARE_URL__ + __URL_CANONICALIZED__ window-flag pins; the live-deploy + cross-runtime + cross-OS verification fires on CI on the next push. Phase 8's overarching deliverables per docs/PHASES.md:543-554 (?run=<fingerprint>&seed=<seed> URL parsing, action log export, action log import + replay viewer, verifier mode, mod-ID slot wiring, action log auto-saved to localStorage, resume on page load, multi-slot save UI keyed by fingerprint, build pipeline extended to publish every release to releases/<commit-short>/, routing that resolves ?run=<fingerprint> to the matching releases/<commit>/, docs/PROD_REQUIREMENTS.md finalized) are satisfied across 8.0 + 8.A.1 + 8.A.2a + 8.A.2b + 8.A.3 + 8.B.

follow_ups_carried_forward: S2 from Phase 7.A.2b (drift sweep candidate) — tests/sim/boss-fsm.test.ts:47-48 and tests/sim/turn.test.ts:419-447 construct synthetic Monster fixtures with the OLD boss stats (hpMax: 40, atk: 9, def: 5). Tests still pass because the fixtures bypass src/registries/monsters.ts. Phase 8.B does not touch these test files so this carry-forward continues; a future drift sweep that touches these test files should update the fixtures to mirror the registry's new (hpMax 24, atk 6, def 4) values for documentation purposes.

S3/S4 from Phase 7.A.2b — tools/probe-seeds.ts and tools/trace-seed.ts and tools/build-win-log.ts are operational diagnostic tools with no automated test coverage. Acceptable per the established Phase 7.A.2a pattern (tools/verify.ts in Phase 8.A.2a established a smoke-test precedent for tools that participate in user-facing verify-flow contracts; the other tools are operational diagnostics). Carry-forward continues.

Code-review S1-S5 + O1-O6 from Phase 8.A.2b + N1-N3 + S1-S5 + O1-O3 from Phase 8.A.3 (advisory-only, all non-blocking) — substitution test depths, share-button input validation, applyRouting unit-test coverage, replay-section UX wording, defensive comments, future split of determinism/no-float-arithmetic. Phase 9 polish targets — not gating.

Phase 8.B did not require a code-reviewer pass — this is the established X.B pattern (the in-sandbox additive work is small and the live-deploy verification IS the review surface). Phase 7.B / 6.B / 5.B / 4.B / 3.B / 2.B / 1.B all skipped the code-reviewer step on the X.B sandbox additions for the same reason.
follow_ups_observations: Phase 8.B is the largest X.B in the project to date by net-new e2e test count (+9 vs +2 in Phase 7.B). The bulk of Phase 8's work (router + save + verifier + codec + dual-build CI + UI sections) landed in 8.A.1 + 8.A.2a + 8.A.2b + 8.A.3; Phase 8.B's only sandbox-resolvable work was the e2e tests pinning the new diagnostic surfaces + the auto-redirect + canonicalization behaviors via window flags. This pattern (X.B = small sandbox add of e2e + observational live-deploy verification) was established by 5.B / 6.B / 7.B; 8.B continues it with a larger surface because Phase 8 added more user-facing wiring than prior phases.

Adding the 9 new e2e tests grows the deploy.yml CI step's test:e2e duration by an estimated +30s per browser (3 browsers = +90s total). The existing test surface is ~22 tests × ~1s each = ~22s; +9 tests at ~1.5s each (slightly slower because some involve clicks + waitForFunction) = +13.5s/browser. Total deploy.yml CI time delta: ~40s. Acceptable budget — the entire deploy.yml run is currently ~3 minutes end-to-end.

The cross-runtime assertion count is now 84 (28 tests × 3 browsers). Per the memo addendum B5 + advisory A7 estimate, the per-page-session in-memory cache + HTTP Cache-Control: max-age=300 headers on releases/index.json keep the index-fetch cost bounded. The 5s AbortController timeout in applyRouting caps the worst-case page-load delay if the GH-Pages CDN is slow. The 'old run after master moves on' deferred-assertion (memo decision 17 + Phase 8.B acceptance criterion at docs/PHASES.md:562) is exercised in synthetic form via the e2e test 'auto-redirect with bare URL is a no-op'; the full check fires on the next rulesetVersion-bumping commit (Phase 9 polish or beyond).

Phase 9 (polish & release hardening) is now unblocked. Per docs/PHASES.md:571-593, Phase 9's deliverables include: atlas-recipe tuning pass + final atlas seed for v1; CRT/scanline post-processing shader; SFX + synthwave tracks; title screen with seed entry + random-seed + paste-fingerprint actions; polished README/CONTRIBUTING/LICENSE/architecture diagram; optional itch.io page + custom domain; daily-seed convention; accessibility pass. Phase 9 is the final phase; it ships the v1 release.
next_phase: Phase 9 — Polish & Release Hardening. Per docs/PHASES.md:571-593: tune the procedural atlas generator until the game looks great + add audio + add a CRT/scanline post-processing shader (toggleable) + add a title screen with seed entry / random-seed / paste-fingerprint actions + polish README + CONTRIBUTING + LICENSE + a polished architecture diagram + optional itch.io page + custom domain + document the daily-seed convention + accessibility pass (keyboard-only navigation + contrast check + prefers-reduced-motion). Acceptance criteria: a first-time visitor lands on the GitHub Pages URL, clicks 'New Run', and plays to floor 1 without reading docs; Lighthouse score > 90 for performance + best-practices; all text rendered through the theme registry (so a future theme mod can replace it); the chosen v1 atlas seed is the one shipped (bumping it post-release would require a rulesetVersion bump and a new releases/<commit>/). Phase 9's lead agents per docs/PHASES.md:575: frontend-builder (juice + generator tuning) + release-hardening (production); reviewers: code-reviewer + qa-playwright. Phase 9 is the FINAL phase; after Phase 9 ships, the project writes artifacts/project-complete.json. The next iteration of the agent loop should pick up phase-9 with a strategy-planner pass on the title screen + atlas-recipe tuning + audio system, then engine-builder + frontend-builder + release-hardening + code-reviewer + qa-playwright before phase signoff.
